channel.title: android on Bhumish's Blog :tada:
channel.description: Recent content in android on Bhumish's Blog :tada:

item.title: Set-up Penetration Testing server on AWS
item.description: Story of how I hosted the Android’s AppInventor project on a Google AppEngine

item.title: Fraud Android App in the name of Jio Prime
item.description: An Instagram page advertised about offering free Jio data if we install the Jio Prime app from their link. I did a static analysis of that application.

item.title: Bypass Root detection in Android - by modifying the APK
item.description: A trick on how to bypass the root-detection mechanism applied by any Android APK

item.title: Bypass Root detection in Android [by modifying the APK]
item.description: When an Android application is having root-detection mechanism, sometimes it can be bypassed by modifying the APK

item.title: Android App Inventor Hosting Project
item.description: Story of how I hosted the Android’s AppInventor project on a Google AppEngine
